LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays a styled sub-section heading for use on Flow screens.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.description: The section heading text to display.

property.name: marginTop
property.label: Margin Top
property.description: Optional space above the header as a CSS length (e.g. 0.5rem, 1rem, 16px). Leave blank for no top margin.

property.name: marginBottom
property.label: Margin Bottom
property.description: Optional space below the header as a CSS length (e.g. 0.5rem, 1rem, 16px). Leave blank to use the default bottom margin.
